_comment: House Slice 3 furniture/trophy table. Spelling one of these words auto-places its prop in the living room (room 0). row=floor sits on the floor (slots 0-3), row=wall hangs as a trophy (slots 0-2). color is [r,g,b] 0-1. Props are drawn with ColorRects (no PNGs) so no Godot editor import is needed. See docs/house-interior-architecture.md section 7.
